compatible_controller_models: GGS Controller Kit, GGS AC5 Power Strip Kit, GGS AC10 Power Strip Kit, S-Station
notes: 2026 version (5L Smart Cool Mist Humidifier). No built-in WiFi or Bluetooth — app/smart control requires GGS Series controller connected via RJ12 cable. 4 mist levels (180–450 ml/h, range confirmed from GGS integration specs). Humidity setpoint 35–95% in 5% increments. 24h timer. Rated for up to 5×5 ft (~150 cm) grow tents. Extendable forked hose 45–180 cm included. Temp/humidity sensor probe (250 cm cable) included. EUR price €89.99 sourced from Amazon.de listing.
